docs:
# Hover Card
Rich preview card that appears on hover with smooth enter/exit motion.
## Import
```tsx
import { HoverCard, HoverCardTrigger, HoverCardContent } from "@/components/ui/hover-card";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<HoverCard name="Ava Chen" role="Design lead" autoPlay={undefined} interval={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **name** (string) — default: `"Ava Chen"`: Name
- **role** (string) — default: `"Design lead"`: Role
- **autoPlay** (boolean): Auto play
- **interval** (number): Interval (ms)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add hover-card
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/hover-card
```
